# Recommended repository labels

Create these labels in the GitHub repository so contributors can find focused
work without reading every issue.

| Label | Suggested color | Use |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `bug` | `d73a4a` | Reproducible incorrect behavior |
| `feature` | `a2eeef` | New product capability proposal |
| `documentation` | `0075ca` | README, guide, launch, or copy work |
| `good first issue` | `7057ff` | Bounded tasks suitable for a first contribution |
| `help wanted` | `008672` | Maintainer is actively seeking external help |
| `translation` | `fbca04` | Locale resources, review, or terminology |
| `needs reproduction` | `e4e669` | More information/minimal fixture needed |
| `formula` | `5319e7` | Formula parsing, preview, or OMML export |
| `windows` | `1d76db` | Packaging or Windows-specific behavior |
